sources.name: O*NET OnLine occupational data
sources.usedFor: modified synthetic occupation task and skill themes

transformation: All candidate identities, organisations, dates, metrics, resumes, job descriptions, and dialogue text are newly authored synthetic fixtures. O*NET occupational themes were substantially rewritten and combined with fictional scenarios.
